title: rumex crispus subsp. crispus
intro: Rumex crispus subsp. crispus, commonly known as curly dock, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of curly dock include reducing swelling and pain, treating digestive issues, and supporting kidney function. Curly dock can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
